emails.subject: RE: Scott Freeman
emails.body: RE: Scott Freeman Karen, Mike Grigsby and I would really appreciate being two of the interviewers of Scott on the 29th if that's not to difficult to arrange. Thanks To: Holst, Keith

emails.subject: RE: Scott Freeman
emails.body: Gee don't know about that keith... have you interviewed him before? Karen. To: Buckley, Karen

emails.subject: RE: Scott Freeman
emails.body: Neither Mike nor I have interviewed Scott before. Our connection to Scott came through a very strong recommendation from our West-Power trading desk in Portland. We are interested in Scott because his west power experience is directly related to the west gas market that Mike and I trade. I don't mean to be a pain. If this is unconventional, Mike and I will make seperate arrangements for Scott to meet with us. Thanks Keith inal Message----- To: Holst, Keith

emails.subject: RE: Scott Freeman
emails.body: Hi keith, We will work the schedule and incorporate you and mike in,, if it gets changed I will give you a heads up. Rgds, Karen. To: Buckley, Karen
